caption: A woman with her hair styled in a high bun and braids is recorded speaking into a professional black microphone during a podcast. She is wearing a dark green t-shirt featuring a red and white graphic on the chest and has a black headset on. She sits in front of a black backdrop that features white text reading "BOSS TALK 101", "It's A League Hustle", and "About It!", along with the word "CAST". To her left is a black table holding a small clear container. A framed photo of hands is visible on the wall behind her. In the lower corners of the scene, logos for "BOSS TALK 101" and "BOSS TALK 101" are displayed. Across the sequence, the woman remains in the same position, speaking and slightly shifting her facial expressions and head posture while addressing the microphone.
